result.summary: Found 2 visual layout issues: the bottom navigation is covering part of the game grid, and several horizontal card rows are clipped on the right edge.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, cutting off the lower row of game tiles so their full cards are not visible.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content or adjust the fixed nav positioning so the last visible row is not obscured.

issues.description: Multiple horizontal sections are clipped on the right side, including the top category tabs and the game carousels, leaving the last item partially off-screen.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the carousel/container has proper horizontal scrolling or spacing so the final card is fully reachable and not cut off at the viewport edge.
